strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and multiple languages
Hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, Vitest-adjacent, workshops, CI/CD)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in resume
Limited explicit cloud platform depth (AWS CDK noted, but GCP/Azure and Kubernetes detail thin)
Kotlin not listed; Java experience is older (robotic arms era)

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin exposure

response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with well above the 6+ year bar, strong TypeScript/Node/React foundations, and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling experience aligned with the role's internal automation focus. Testing rigor and architecture exposure are clear strengths, though Nest.js and current Kotlin/Java work are not explicitly demonstrated and cloud/container depth is only partially evidenced.
